Strting query: Please create an agentic workflow json template that can solve this task:
user query: Fetch xView1 images from Athens International Airport, Greece. Consider a wide area. Then run the Swin-L detector and finally please zoom the map there!
task description: Appropriately break down the task and assign relevant realistic agent definitions including tools and a smart workflow coordination of these agents.

description: Agentic workflow to fetch satellite images around Athens International Airport, run detections, and visualize the area on a map.
label: Athens International Airport Image Fetch and Analyze Workflow

participants.description: Identify and define the geographical bounds around Athens International Airport for image fetching.
participants.label: DataAgent

config.name: geospatial_analyst
config.description: Defines the geographical bounds for the area around Athens International Airport.
config.system_message: You will define the geographical bounds around Athens International Airport, Greece.

participants.description: Fetch xView1 images based on the defined geographical bounds.
participants.label: DataAgent

config.name: data_acquisition_specialist
config.description: Fetches xView1 images defined by the geographical bounds.
config.system_message: You will fetch xView1 images based on the defined geographical bounds.

participants.description: Run the Swin-L detector on the fetched xView1 images.
participants.label: VisionAgent

config.name: vision_analysis_agent
config.description: Processes the fetched images through the Swin-L detector.
config.system_message: You will run the Swin-L detector on the fetched images.

participants.description: Zoom the map to visualize the area around Athens International Airport.
participants.label: MapAgent

config.name: mapping_specialist
config.description: Visualizes the area by zooming into the specified bounds on a map.
config.system_message: You will zoom into the map around Athens International Airport.
